author: qwai-tech
description: AI chat, agents, and MCP tooling for your notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: QWAI
manifest.description: Full autonomous Agentic workspace. Understands notes, links, and canvas to plan and execute complex vault tasks.
manifest.name: Intelligence Assistant

name: Intelligence Assistant

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Intelligence Assistant 0.0.21

### Installation
Download and install via Obsidian's community plugins browser, or manually copy the files below to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/intelligence-assistant/` folder.

### Release assets
- `main.js` — plugin bundle
- `styles.css` — plugin styles
- `manifest.json` — plugin metadata
releases.name: Intelligence Assistant 0.0.21
